options.name: -name
options.description: Name of the user defined bus group(s) to be reported

options.name: -nets
options.description: Name of net(s) to be reported

options.name: -type
options.description: Reports type of bundled bus to be reported.

options.name: -unmerged
options.description: Generate report without bus merging (bool, optional) > <filename> # Redirect output to file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <filename> # Append to output file
